name: Brutal Buckler
description: Notes Part of the Agents of Oryx Abilities.

stats.range: Shield Bash: 4 tiles; Full Strength: 5.7 tiles
stats.shots: 8 (from shield bash); 12 (from Full Strength); 20 total (arc gap: Shield Bash: 7°; Full Strength: 30°)
stats.projectiles: 8 (from shield bash); 12 (from Full Strength); 20 total (arc gap: Shield Bash: 7°; Full Strength: 30°)

effects: Full Strength: Shoots additional radial projectiles with a longer range when used above 80% HP. Shots hit multiple targets Shots pass through obstacles
